title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 347.167 - Service of process, venue
text:
347.167.  Service of process, venue. — Service on a foreign limited liability company shall be as provided in section 347.033.  Venue of actions against foreign limited liability companies shall be as provided in section 347.069.
(L. 1993 S.B. 66 & 20 § 359.814) 
Effective 12-01-93
